overall.description: Game engine footage showing a smooth drone flight through an open plaza toward a large modern stadium with distinctive rainbow-colored paneling. The camera moves steadily forward under clear blue skies, revealing architectural details of the stadium and surrounding buildings.

agents.ego_description: flying drone steadily forward through the open plaza toward the colorful stadium structure

entered.detail: large stadium building with distinctive rainbow-colored panel facade and curved metallic roof
multi-story beige building with regular window grid pattern
industrial building with corrugated metal siding in light gray
single green tree in the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of an empty concrete plaza under clear blue skies. The camera moves forward toward a striking stadium with rainbow-colored panels, while a beige office building stands to the left and a corrugated metal warehouse is visible on the right.

events.description: green trees on right side become prominent as camera approaches stadium entrance

agents.ego_description: continuing drone flight closer to the stadium facade, revealing entrance details and surrounding trees

entered.detail: cluster of green leafy trees lining the right side of the plaza
curved metallic roof framework extending over the stadium

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its approach toward the stadium, bringing the colorful facade into close view. Trees become visible on the right side of the plaza while the initial office building passes out of view behind the camera. The curved roof structure of the stadium becomes visible against the sky as the camera nears the entrance doors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drone movement across an open concrete plaza toward the vibrant facade of a modern stadium. It begins with a wide view of the empty expanse under clear blue skies, flanked by a beige office building to the left and a corrugated metal warehouse to the right. As the camera advances, the office building recedes from view while a line of trees emerges on the right side of the plaza. The scene then shifts focus toward the stadium's striking rainbow-colored panels, which grow larger and more detailed as the drone approaches. Finally, the perspective reveals the stadium's curved roof structure against the sky before gliding toward the entrance doors.
